name: 04 — Weekly Summary Digest (Monday 09:00)
_comment: Fires every Monday at 09:00. Fetches the weekly digest from the API and fires a weekly_summary webhook event to Zapier. An optional disabled backup node is included — enable and connect to cloud storage to automate weekly backup.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ event: 'weekly_summary', payload: { summary: $json.summary, summaryText: $json.summaryText, funnel: $json.funnel, ingestion: $json.ingestion, newThisWeek: $json.newThisWeek, generatedAt: $json.generatedAt } }) }}

nodes.name: Optional: Fetch Export Payload
nodes.notes: Disabled by default. Enable and connect to a cloud storage (Google Drive, S3) to create an automated weekly backup.
